page.headline: Client account center
page.body: Ready for Shopify Customer Account API or a headless auth provider.

cards.ordersBody: View order status, tracking, returns, and receipts.
cards.profileBody: Manage email, address book, preferences, and GDPR export.
cards.wishlistBody: Return to saved AMAMBRA pieces before checkout.

orders.headline: Order history connects here.
orders.body: Production should connect Shopify Customer Accounts or a secure account provider before exposing customer order data.

profile.headline: Profile and consent preferences
profile.body: This page is structured for account preferences, address management, marketing consent, GDPR data export, and deletion requests. Connect Shopify Customer Accounts or your chosen auth provider before launch.

wishlist.emptyBody: Save products while you browse and return to them before checkout.
wishlist.headline: Saved pieces
